Class SyntaxElementCursor

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.SyntaxElementCursor
public class SyntaxElementCursor extends Object
A cursor (or walker) for navigating SyntaxElements in pre-order.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SyntaxElement
    getCurrentNode()
     
    boolean
    gotoFirstChild()
    Advance the cursor to the current node's first child if possible.
    boolean
    goToNext()
    Advance cursor to the next node.
    boolean
    gotoNextDirectSibling()
    Advance the cursor to the current node's next sibling if possible.
    boolean
    gotoNextSibling()
    Advance the cursor to the current node's next sibling if possible.
    boolean
    gotoParent()
    Advance the cursor to the current node's parent if possible.
    boolean
    hasNext()
     

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • hasNext

      public boolean hasNext()

    • getCurrentNode

      public SyntaxElement getCurrentNode()

    • gotoFirstChild

      public boolean gotoFirstChild()
      Advance the cursor to the current node's first child if possible. Otherwise, no changes to the state occur.
      Returns:
      true iff the current node has at least one child.

    • gotoNextDirectSibling

      public boolean gotoNextDirectSibling()
      Advance the cursor to the current node's next sibling if possible. Otherwise, no changes to the state occur.
      Returns:
      true iff the current node has at least one sibling not yet visited.

    • gotoNextSibling

      public boolean gotoNextSibling()
      Advance the cursor to the current node's next sibling if possible. If no direct sibling exists, go up one step and try again. Otherwise, no changes to the state occur.
      Returns:
      true iff the current node has at least one sibling not yet visited.

    • gotoParent

      public boolean gotoParent()
      Advance the cursor to the current node's parent if possible. Otherwise, no changes to the state occur.
      Returns:
      true iff the current node is not the root.

    • goToNext

      public boolean goToNext()
      Advance cursor to the next node. If the node has children, the cursor advances to the first child. Otherwise, if the node has unvisited siblings, the cursor advances to the next unvisited sibling. Otherwise, no changes to the state.
      Returns:
      true iff the node has children or an unvisited sibling.
